---
title: "Resources"
description: "Curated tools, databases, and learning resources for computational scientists"
toc: true
---

A curated collection of open resources I find useful in my daily research. Contributions and suggestions welcome — [open an issue](https://github.com/himanshu-goel).

---

## Molecular & chemical databases

| Database | Description | Link |
|----------|-------------|------|
| **ChEMBL** | Bioactivity data for drug-like molecules | [chembl.ebi.ac.uk](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/chembl/) |
| **PubChem** | Chemical structures, properties, bioassays | [pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov](https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/) |
| **ZINC** | Commercially available compounds for docking | [zinc.docking.org](https://zinc.docking.org/) |
| **DrugBank** | Drug targets, interactions, pharmacology | [drugbank.com](https://www.drugbank.com/) |
| **BindingDB** | Measured protein-ligand binding affinities | [bindingdb.org](https://www.bindingdb.org/) |
| **PDB** | Experimental protein structures | [rcsb.org](https://www.rcsb.org/) |
| **UniProt** | Protein sequences and functional annotation | [uniprot.org](https://www.uniprot.org/) |

---

## Toxicology & safety resources

| Resource | Description | Link |
|----------|-------------|------|
| **ToxCast / CompTox** | EPA HTS data for 10,000+ chemicals | [comptox.epa.gov](https://comptox.epa.gov/) |
| **hERG Central** | Curated hERG activity database | [chembl](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/chembl/) |
| **vNN-ADMET** | ADMET prediction server | [vnnadmet.bhsai.org](https://vnnadmet.bhsai.org/) |
| **SwissADME** | ADME/drug-likeness predictor | [swissadme.ch](http://www.swissadme.ch/) |
| **ADMETlab 2.0** | Comprehensive ADMET evaluation | [admetmesh.scbdd.com](https://admetmesh.scbdd.com/) |
| **DSSTox** | Distributed Structure Searchable Toxicity DB | [comptox.epa.gov](https://comptox.epa.gov/dashboard) |

---

## Key Python libraries

| Library | Use | Install |
|---------|-----|---------|
| **RDKit** | Cheminformatics swiss-army knife | `conda install -c conda-forge rdkit` |
| **DeepChem** | ML for drug discovery | `pip install deepchem` |
| **MDAnalysis** | MD trajectory analysis | `pip install MDAnalysis` |
| **OpenMM** | GPU MD simulations | `conda install -c conda-forge openmm` |
| **py3Dmol** | 3D molecular visualization | `pip install py3Dmol` |
| **LangChain** | LLM application framework | `pip install langchain` |
| **LangGraph** | Agentic AI workflows | `pip install langgraph` |
| **biopython** | Bioinformatics utilities | `pip install biopython` |
| **pydeseq2** | DESeq2 in Python | `pip install pydeseq2` |

---

## AI agents for biomedical research

A growing ecosystem of LLM-based agents is transforming biomedical science. Below is a curated overview across three domains. Full interactive map: [broad.io/AIAgent](http://broad.io/AIAgent)

### Drug discovery & development

| Agent | Capability |
|-------|------------|
| **DrugAgent** | Drug–target interaction prediction |
| **MolRL-MGPT** | De novo small-molecule design |
| **ProtAgents** | De novo protein design |
| **BioDiscoveryAgent** | Drug target efficacy validation |
| **The Virtual Lab** | Nanobody design and optimization |
| **ChemCrow** | Chemical synthesis reasoning and execution |
| **LLM-RDF** | Automated chemical synthesis planning |
| **CACTUS** | General drug discovery assistance |
| **SwiftDossier** | Automated target dossier generation |
| **DrugPilot** | End-to-end drug discovery pipeline |
| **PRIME** | Protein engineering support |
| **Chemist-X** | Reaction condition recommendation |

### Multi-omic & bioinformatics analysis

| Agent | Capability |
|-------|------------|
| **CellAgent** | Single-cell RNA-seq analysis |
| **AutoBA** | Multi-omic data analysis |
| **GeneAgent** | Gene-set analysis |
| **GenoTEX** | Gene–trait association analysis |
| **BioAgents** | Bioinformatics workflow automation |
| **Genesis** | Systems biology automation |
| **CRISPR-GPT** | CRISPR experiment design |
| **CellAgentChat** | Cell–cell interaction analysis |
| **DrBioRight 2.0** | Cancer proteomics analysis |
| **Agentomics-ML** | Omics data modeling |
| **BIA** | Single-cell RNA-seq analysis |
| **Biomni** | General biomedical research assistance |
| **CellForge** | Virtual cell modeling |

---

## Learning resources

### Computational drug discovery & cheminformatics

- [TeachOpenCADD](https://github.com/volkamerlab/teachopencadd) — Jupyter notebook tutorials on CADD (Volkamer Lab)
- [Practical Cheminformatics Tutorials](https://github.com/PatWalters/practical_cheminformatics_tutorials) — Pat Walters' hands-on notebooks
- [Useful RDKit Utils](https://patwalters.github.io/Useful-RDKit-Utils/) — RDKit utility functions and recipes
- [Cheminformatics Teaching Material](https://github.com/Sulstice/Cheminformatics-Teaching-Material) — Broad introductory material
- [LibreTexts Cheminformatics Course](https://chem.libretexts.org/Courses/Intercollegiate_Courses/Cheminformatics) — Free online textbook-style course
- [ML in Chemical Science & Engineering](https://github.com/webbtheosim/CBE512-MLinChmSciEng) — Princeton CBE512 course materials
- [Practical Programming in Chemistry](https://github.com/schwallergroup/2024-practical-programming-in-chemistry-exercises) — Schwaller group exercises
- [ML Drug Discovery](https://github.com/nrflynn2/ml-drug-discovery) — Notebooks covering key ML workflows
- [Molecule Predictions Resource List](https://github.com/stars/sgbaird/lists/molecule-predictions) — Curated GitHub list of molecular ML repos
- [GNNs for Chemists](https://github.com/HFooladi/GNNs-For-Chemists) — Graph neural network tutorials for chemistry
- [FastProp Property Prediction](https://github.com/JacksonBurns/fastprop) — Fast molecular property prediction demo
- [In Silico Chemistry](https://www.insilicochemistry.io) — Computational chemistry learning platform
- [SILCS documentation](https://silcsbio.com/) — Official SILCS methodology resources

### Agentic AI & LLMs for science

- [Broad AI Agent Map](http://broad.io/AIAgent) — Interactive overview of AI agents across biomedical domains
- [GeneSight BioRAG](https://github.com/Bioinformatics-AI-Lab/genesight-biorag) — RAG-based bioinformatics assistant
- [bioSkills (GPTomics)](https://github.com/GPTomics/bioSkills) — LLM-assisted bioinformatics skill building
- [LangChain docs](https://python.langchain.com/)
- [LangGraph documentation](https://langchain-ai.github.io/langgraph/)
- [DeepLearning.AI short courses](https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/) — Agentic AI, RAG, tool-use

### Bioinformatics & multi-omics

- [Computational Biology Course (UNC)](https://biodatascience.github.io/compbio/) — Open course materials
- [OmicNetR](https://github.com/ppchaudhary/OmicNetR) — Multi-omics network analysis in R
- [Unsupervised Analysis Pipelines (epigen)](https://github.com/epigen/unsupervised_analysis) — Epigenomics unsupervised analysis workflows
- [Genomic-Based Classification](https://github.com/Nicolas-Radomski/GenomicBasedClassification) — ML classifiers for genomic data
- [Bioconductor workflows](https://www.bioconductor.org/help/workflows/)
- [Harvard Chan Bioinformatics Core training](https://hbctraining.github.io/main/)

### Machine learning for healthcare

- [MIT ML for Healthcare (6.S897)](https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/6-s897-machine-learning-for-healthcare-spring-2019/pages/lecture-notes/) — Lecture notes from MIT's ML healthcare course
- [BRAID (Genentech)](https://github.com/Genentech/BRAID) — Drug combination synergy modeling

### Molecular dynamics

- [CHARMM-GUI](https://www.charmm-gui.org/) — System builder for MD simulations
- [GROMACS tutorials](http://www.mdtutorials.com/gmx/)
- [MDANCE](https://github.com/mqcomplab/MDANCE) — Molecular dynamics analysis and clustering toolkit
- [OpenMM documentation](https://openmm.org/)

---

## Recommended books & texts

- *Introduction to Computational Chemistry* — Frank Jensen
- *The Art of Drug Synthesis* — Johnson & Li
- *Bioinformatics Algorithms* — Compeau & Pevzner (free online)
- *Deep Learning for the Life Sciences* — Bharath Ramsundar et al. (O'Reilly)
- *Machine Learning for Drug Discovery* — [Manning](https://www.manning.com/books/machine-learning-for-drug-discovery)
- *Deep Learning for Molecules and Materials* — [dmol.pub](https://dmol.pub/) (free online)
